title: cynanchum sahyadricum
intro: Cynanchum sahyadricum, also known as Sahyadrividyaraja, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is native to the Western Ghats region of India and is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of bioactive compounds like alkaloids and saponins. The plant is reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which may help in treating conditions such as fever, skin infections, and wounds. Traditionally, Cynanchum sahyadricum is used in herbal preparations like decoctions and infusions, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
